component.name: Ventriloquism Studio
component.summary: High-performance audio-synced puppetry for digital performances

description.p: Ventriloquism Studio is a specialized puppet engine designed to animate static imagery in precise synchronization with vocal recordings. Utilizing Rust-driven digital signal processing, the tool provides exact masking and jaw-drop physics for neologistic performances and archival animation.

Developed as a core utility for the Moribund Institute, the application focuses on modularity and speed, allowing for the rapid generation of puppet-style video content for integration into modern nonlinear video editors.

screenshot.caption: The main studio interface with puppet physics controls.
